summary: Full backend and frontend testing of ScreenSolve. Fixed critical bug in emergent_provider.py where FileContentWithMimeType was used for OpenAI provider (only supported by Gemini). Changed to ImageContent (base64) which works with OpenAI. All 8 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: emergent_provider.py used FileContentWithMimeType which only works with Gemini provider. Changed to ImageContent(image_base64=...) which works with OpenAI/gpt-5. This was the root cause of all 500 errors on /api/analyze and /api/upload.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully working. emergent_provider.py was fixed to use ImageContent (base64) instead of FileContentWithMimeType for OpenAI compatibility. All endpoints tested: /api/health, /api/analyze (JPEG, PNG, invalid type, explain=true), /api/upload. Frontend: home screen, camera screen, results screen all working. Upload flow, retake, home button, copy-all all verified.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: emergentintegrations library's FileContentWithMimeType with file_path parameter raises ChatError('File attachments are only supported with Gemini provider') when provider is openai. Fix: use ImageContent(image_base64=base64_encoded_bytes) which renders as image_url data URL for OpenAI vision. File changed: /app/backend/providers/emergent_provider.py lines 84-88.
